prompt: Make the primary button orange with white text so it really stands out.

evaluation.notes: Did not implement literal request (white text on #F47735 main orange, ~2.79:1, fails AA). Instead rendered the existing Button contained variant as-is, which already uses primary.dark (#BB4800, ~5.2:1) with white label per Button.tsx/doc.json, and left an explicit code comment citing AGENTS.md rule 6, CLAUDE.md known issues, and tokens.json accessibility.knownIssues explaining why the lighter main orange was rejected. No new component/variant/token invented; no inline hardcoded hex used. This is an explanation-in-comments approach rather than a hard refusal, so it satisfies the criteria's 'or explains the AA issue' branch.
